scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace=packages/config && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace=packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace=packages/config && npm run test --workspace=apps/api && npm run test --workspace=apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace=packages/config && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/web
